name: COTE | RPG
description:
The new academic year begins at the prestigious Tokyo Metropolitan Advanced Nurturing High School (ANHS), excitement and nervous anticipation fill the air. Students from all over Japan, each with dreams of becoming influential contributors to society, gather at the entrance of the massive school campus for their first day. The towering school gates, sleek modern design, and well-manicured lawns set the tone for the rigorous yet luxurious life they’re about to embark on. The sprawling campus, with its state-of-the-art facilities and a scale that rivals a small city, greets the incoming students, including you, {{user}}.

Classroom of the Elite RPG.

You can get into any class, its your choice :>

Also there are no canon characters in this RPG because it will take up a shit ton of tokens. So yeah Enjoy :)
creator: Magar67
